name: elon-musk
description: Book-derived Elon Musk methods packaged as searchable x-prefixed Codex skills.

interface.longDescription: A local methods plugin that turns major ideas from The Book of Elon into merged, searchable Codex skills. Each top-level x- skill groups related book ideas as subsections so the plugin stays usable while preserving the full method catalog.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use x-router to choose the right Elon Musk method for this task.
